tasks.prompt: Add a module exporting a function that formats an amount given in integer cents plus a currency code into a display string: pick the right symbol for USD ($) and EUR (€), show two decimal places, and group the whole part with thousands separators (e.g. 123456 USD -> "$1,234.56").
Add a module exporting a function that turns a post title into a URL slug: lowercase it, trim it, strip punctuation, and collapse runs of whitespace into single hyphens.
Add a module exporting a function that formats a unix-millisecond timestamp into a YYYY-MM-DD date string with zero-padded month and day.
Add a module exporting a function that shortens a string to a maximum length: if it is longer than the max, cut it, trim trailing whitespace, and append an ellipsis character.
Add a module exporting a function that parses a short duration string like "30s", "5m", "2h", or "1d" into a number of milliseconds, throwing an error on malformed input.
